title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. to Host Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD) announced it will release second quarter 2023 financial results after the market close on Thursday, July 27, 2023. The Company will host a conference call the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. To hear a live audio webcast of the call, visit Events and Presentations on the Investor section of the Company's website, investor.mt.com. title: 3 Instruments Stocks to Watch From a Prospering Industry
text: The Zacks Instruments - Scientific industry participants like Harvard Bioscience (HBIO), Mettler-Toledo (MTD) and Waters (WAT) are gaining from strong life science, pharmaceutical and academic end-market demand despite the challenging macroeconomic environment.
